research_basis: SLSA verification requires checking artifacts and provenance against expectations.
Test receipts must preserve reproducible command, return code, and output evidence.
rules: Every required artifact must exist, be non-empty, and match expected SHA-256.
Every test receipt must have expected return code, actual return code, stdout/stderr hashes, and PASS status.
Every gate result must PASS before verification can PASS.
Coverage summary must reconcile with actual artifact, test, and gate counts.
Verification packet verdict must be PASS before downstream trace analysis.
